Title:
Few design partnerships stand the test of time, but the relationship between Barker and Stonehouse and ercol has endured for more than 80 years. Built on shared values of craftsmanship, quality and thoughtful design, it is a collaboration that has shaped British interiors for generations.

With the fourth generation now stepping forward in both family businesses, George Barker and Henry Tadros reflect on the 80 year journey together.
Description:

Title:
We’re delighted to be taking part in the Great Knaresborough Bed Race this year 🛏️

On 13th June, our team will be taking part in this unique event – part fancy dress parade, part gruelling 2.4-mile race, finishing with a swim through the icy River Nidd! 🥶

We’re excited to be fundraising for Jennyruth Workshop, a local registered charity that provides meaningful work and skills development opportunities for adults with learning disabilities. They create a safe, inclusive and supportive environment where individuals can build confidence, develop new and existing skills, be recognised for their abilities, and make valuable contributions to their community.

We’re especially proud that Jennyruth Workshops are also helping us build elements of our parade float, making this a real collaboration from start to finish.

Our team brings together colleagues from across the business, led by our Team Captain, George B.

If you’re able to support us, we’d be incredibly grateful for any donation, big or small – every contribution goes towards an amazing cause 🙌
👉
